allow: Bash(node -e "const sc = require\(''./data/seo_content.json''\); const b = require\(''./data/businesses.json''\); const entry = sc[''auckland/cuisine/italian-restaurants'']; const businesses = b.filter\(x => x.city === ''Auckland'' && x.industry === ''Italian Restaurants''\); console.log\(''SEO sections:'', Object.keys\(entry\)\); console.log\(''Businesses:'', businesses.length\); businesses.forEach\(x => console.log\(''-'', x.name, ''|'', x.neighborhood||'''', ''| highlights:'', \(x.highlights||[]\).length\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const { chromium } = require\(''playwright''\); chromium.launch\(\).then\(b => { console.log\(''Playwright OK, browser version:'', b.version\(\)\); b.close\(\); }\)")
